definition: Based on the information you have at the moment.

sentence.en: By the look of things, he did not commit a crime.
sentence.uz: Vaziyatga (ishning ko'rinishiga) qaraganda, u jinoyat sodir etmagan.

definition: Speak directly and clearly about something, even if it is unpleasant.

sentence.en: Let's call a spade a spade - you cheated on me!
sentence.uz: Keling, hamma narsani o'z nomi bilan ataylik (ochig'ini aytaylik) - sen menga xiyonat qilding!

options: narsalarni o'z nomi bilan atash, borini ochiq aytish

definition: Be very incompetent and extremely bad at something.

sentence.en: I can't drive a truck for toffee; I am very bad at it.
sentence.uz: Men yuk mashinasini umuman boshqara olmayman (bunga mutlaqo qobiliyatim yo'q).

word: Can't make head nor tail of something
definition: Can't understand something at all.

sentence.en: I couldn't make head nor tail of that old book.
sentence.uz: U eski kitobning mazmuniga umuman tushuna olmadim (boshi ham, oxiri ham yo'q).

definition: Cannot be changed; permanent.

sentence.en: We haven't carved anything in stone yet, so your ideas are welcome.
sentence.uz: Biz hali hech narsani yakuniy (o'zgarmas) qilib belgilaganimiz yo'q, shuning uchun takliflaringizni berishingiz mumkin.

definition: To make a situation less encouraging, enjoyable, or hopeful and more unpleasant.

sentence.en: The sad news about his health condition cast a shadow over our meeting.
sentence.uz: Uning salomatligi haqidagi qayg'uli xabar uchrashuvimizga soya soldi (kayfiyatni buzdi).

definition: To discover (or catch) someone in the act of committing a crime or doing something bad or illegal.

sentence.en: The police caught her red-handed with stolen diamonds in her purse.
sentence.uz: Polisiya uni hamyonidagi o'g'irlangan brilliantlar bilan jinoyat ustida (jinoyat joyida) qo'lga tushirdi.

definition: To emphasize that someone is unusually quiet.

sentence.en: What's the matter? Cat got your tongue?
sentence.uz: Senga nima bo'ldi? Tilingni yutib yubordingmi (nega jimsan)?

options: tilingni yutib yuborish, odatdagidan jim bo'lish

definition: Someone with expensive preferences and low income.

sentence.en: Tina spent her entire salary on a designer jacket, she definitely has champagne taste on a beer budget.
sentence.uz: Tina bor maoshini dizaynerlik ko'ylagiga sarfladi, uning topishi pashshaning qanoti-yu, lekin xohishi daxshat (orzulari osmonda).

options: daromadi kam bo'lsa-da dabdabani (qimmat narsalarni) xohlash

definition: To limit someone's power, freedom, or comfort.

sentence.en: Her parents clipped her wings by refusing to pay for her luxurious life.
sentence.uz: Ota-onasi uning dabdabali hayotini moliyalashtirishni rad etib, qanotlarini qiyqib qo'yishdi (erkinligini cheklashdi).

word: Close the stable door after the horse has bolted
definition: To emphasize that it is too late to take action to prevent something undesirable/unwanted from happening, because it has already happened.

sentence.en: I've already been robbed, so it's a bit late to close the door after the horse has bolted.
sentence.uz: Meni allaqachon tunab ketishgan, shuning uchun endi ehtiyot chorasini ko'rishdan foyda yo'q (ot qochgandan keyin og'ilni yopish).

options: ot qochgandan keyin og'ilni yopish (kech bo'lganda chora ko'rish)

definition: To fail badly; to fall down.

sentence.en: Investors have come a cropper on this project.
sentence.uz: Investorlar ushbu loyihada qattiq pand yeyishdi (omadsizlikka uchrashdi).

definition: To win unexpectedly while in a losing position.

sentence.en: The red team came from behind to beat the green team 6-5.
sentence.uz: Qizil jamoa yutqazayotgan joyidan kutilmaganda hisobni o'zgartirib, yashil jamoani 6:5 hisobida yutdi.

definition: To ruin someone's plans; prevent success.

sentence.en: This front-page scandal news will surely cook his goose.
sentence.uz: Birinchi sahifadagi ushbu mashmashali xabar uning rejalarini albatta chippakka chiqaradi (barbod qiladi).

definition: To falsify a company's financial records.

sentence.en: He made thousands from cooking the books before the fraud department caught him.
sentence.uz: Firibgarlik bo'limi uni ushlamasidan oldin u moliyaviy hisobotlarni soxtalashtirib minglab pul ishlab olgan edi.

word: Couldn't fight their way out of a paper bag
definition: Weak or ineffective; without much energy or ability.

sentence.en: He's absolutely useless as an ally - he couldn't fight his way out of a paper bag!
sentence.uz: U ittifoqchi sifatida mutlaqo foydasiz - qo'lidan hech narsa kelmaydi (juda zaif).

options: qo'lidan hech narsa kelmaslik, o'ta zaif/no'noq bo'lish

definition: An admission of defeat or failure.

sentence.en: It is sad to hear such a counsel of despair from our government about the economy.
sentence.uz: Hukumatimizdan iqtisodiy vaziyat bo'yicha bunday umidsizlik (mag'lubiyatni tan olish) bayonotini eshitish ayanchli.

definition: To suddenly or unexpectedly appear after a long time (usually for selfish purposes).

sentence.en: After his song became a hit, his ex-girlfriend came crawling out of the woodwork.
sentence.uz: Uning qo'shig'i xit bo'lganidan keyin, sobiq sevgilisi kutilmaganda (manfaat ko'zlab) paydo bo'lib qoldi.

options: manfaat ko'zlab kutilmaganda paydo bo'lib qolish

definition: To wish for something unattainable.

sentence.en: I wish there were 40 hours in a day. Well, you're crying for the moon!
sentence.uz: Kashf kunda 40 soat bo'lsa. E, sen erishib bo'lmas narsani orzu qilyapsan!

definition: Adorable; graceful; very cute.

sentence.en: Your little sister is cute as a button.
sentence.uz: Sening singling shunchalik shirin (juda yoqimtoy).

definition: To end something earlier than expected or planned.

sentence.en: His promising career was cut short by a terrible accident.
sentence.uz: Uning porloq karyerasi daxshatli baxtsiz hodisa sababli vaqtidan oldin yakunlandi (kesildi).

definition: To cut down severely; reduce to the bare minimum.

sentence.en: We need to cut our expenses to the bone.
sentence.uz: Biz xarajatlarimizni maksimal darajada (eng minimal darajagacha) qisqartirishimiz kerak.

options: xarajat yoki narsani minimal darajagacha keskin qisqartirish

definition: To die for nothing; to sacrifice yourself for a cause that ends up being useless.

sentence.en: Commander, you need to retreat! Don't let your warriors die in vain.
sentence.uz: Komandir, chekinishingiz kerak! Jangchilaringizning bekorga (hech qanday foydasiz) qurbon bo'lishiga yo'l qo'ymang.

definition: To emphasize that you do not want to change your plans; to refuse to do something.

sentence.en: I tried to persuade her to choose another restaurant, but she dug her heels in.
sentence.uz: Men uni boshqa restoran tanlashga ko'ndirishga urindim, lekin u o'z so'zida turib oldi (oyog'ini tirab oldi).

options: o'z so'zida turib olish, rad etish

word: Discretion is the better part of valour
definition: To emphasize that it is better to avoid unnecessary risks or unpleasant situations.

sentence.en: Danny, discretion is the better part of valour, so don't be a hero and go home!
sentence.uz: Denni, ehtiyotkorlik mardlikning yarmi (yaxshisi tavakkal qilma), qahramonlik ko'rsatmay uyingga ket!

definition: To reduce the amount of money you pay someone as a penalty/punishment.

sentence.en: The package is damaged. Fine, but dock his wages.
sentence.uz: Posilka shikastlangan. Mayli, qabul qil, lekin uning oyligidan urib qol (maoshini qisqartir).

word: Don't give up the day job
definition: Make it clear to someone that you do not believe in the success of their new idea, plan, project, or hobby (in a playful and non-offensive manner).

sentence.en: Interesting idea for a book, but don't give up the day job.
sentence.uz: Kitob uchun qiziqarli g'oya, lekin asosiy ishingni tashlamay qo'ya qol (bu yangi ishingda muvaffaqiyatga ishonmayman).

options: hazilomuz tarzda yangi ishidan muvaffaqiyat chiqmasligini aytish

word: Do someone a world of good
definition: To make someone feel better or much healthier; to be very helpful for someone.

sentence.en: The mountain air will do you a world of good.
sentence.uz: Tog' havosi sizga juda yaxshi ta'sir qiladi (sog'lig'ingizni tiklaydi).

definition: Extremely sad; unhappy; very depressed.

sentence.en: Vince has been down in the dumps ever since his wife died.
sentence.uz: Xotini vafot etganidan beri Vinsning kayfiyati yo'q (chuqur tushkunlikda).

definition: Dress warmly; wear several types of clothing at once to keep warm.

sentence.en: You're going to Norway, so dress in layers.
sentence.uz: Siz Norvegiyaga ketyapsiz, shuning uchun qat-qat (issiq) kiyinib oling.

definition: To say or do something foolish or embarrassing.

sentence.en: I dropped a clanger when I asked him about the wedding on our first date.
sentence.uz: Birinchi uchrashuvimizdayoq to'y haqida so'rab, noqulay/ahmoqona xato qilib qo'ydim.

options: noqulay/ahmoqona gap yoki xatoga yo'l qo'yish

definition: Pleasant to look at or listen to.

sentence.en: I like classical music because it's easy on the ear.
sentence.uz: Menga klassik muzika yoqadi, chunki u quloqqa yoqimli.

word: Eat someone out of house and home
definition: To eat a lot of someone's food, especially when you're a guest in their house (often said in a humorous manner).

sentence.en: I didn't invite you here to eat me out of house and home.
sentence.uz: Men sizlarni bu yerga uyimni ship-shiyron qilib (bor ovqatimni yeb bitirish uchun) taklif qilmagandim.

options: birovning bor ovqatini yeb bitirish (ship-shiyron qilish)

definition: An assumption based on knowledge of the situation and therefore most likely correct.

sentence.en: I can't say exactly how much it will cost, but I can make an educated guess.
sentence.uz: Aniq qancha turishini aytolmayman, lekin bilim va tajribamga tayanib taxmin qila olaman.

definition: Everyone has at least one happy or successful moment in life.

sentence.en: Your startup has failed, but don't lose hope and remember that every dog has its day.
sentence.uz: Startapingiz muvaffaqiyatsiz tugadi, lekin umidni uzmang - unutmang, har kimning omadi chopadigan kuni keladi.

options: omad chopadigan kun kelishi (hamma hayotida bir bor muvaffaqiyatga erishishi)

definition: To fail to finish an activity; no longer be effective.

sentence.en: Many clubs and resorts fall by the wayside during a recession.
sentence.uz: Inqiroz paytida ko'plab klublar va kurortlar faoliyatini to'xtatadi (chekda qolib ketadi/omadsizlikka uchraydi).

options: faoliyatini to'xtatish, chekda qolib ketish/omadsiz bo'lish

definition: To be discovered by your enemy; to be discovered by unfriendly/dangerous people.

sentence.en: If this document falls into the wrong hands, it could be catastrophic.
sentence.uz: Agar bu hujjat noto'g'ri (begona/xavfli) qo'llarga tushib qolsa, bu falokat bo'lishi mumkin.

definition: Not likely to happen; extremely unlikely.

sentence.en: Let's face it, you have a fat chance of getting the job.
sentence.uz: Keling, haqiqatga tik boqaylik - sizda bu ishga kirish uchun deyarli hech qanday imkoniyat yo'q.

definition: A social mistake; embarrassing error; something socially awkward.

sentence.en: Arriving at the party early or on time is a faux pas.
sentence.uz: Ziyofatga vaqtidan oldin yoki ayni vaqtida kelish odobsizlik (noqulay ijtimoiy xato) hisoblanadi.

definition: Very tired.

sentence.en: After the marathon we were fit to drop.
sentence.uz: Marafon tugagandan keyin charchoqdan yiqilay dedik (o'lar darajada charchadik).

definition: Looks promising at first glance, but ends up being very disappointing.

sentence.en: Their early success flattered to deceive.
sentence.uz: Ularning dastlabki muvaffaqiyati umidbaxsh ko'ringandi, lekin yakunda qattiq umidsizlikka sabab bo'ldi.

options: dastlab yaxshi ko'rinib, yakunda umidni mutlaqo uzish/aldab qo'yish

definition: To keep wasting energy or time on something when there is no chance of success.

sentence.en: Stop asking me, I won't tell you. You do like flogging a dead horse, don't you?
sentence.uz: Mendan so'rashni to'xtat, baribir aytmayman. Hech qanday natija bermaydigan ishga bekorga vaqt sarflashni yaxshi ko'rasan-a?

options: natija bermaydigan ishga bekorga vaqt/g'ayrat sarflash

definition: To become very angry; to lose control; react too angrily to something insignificant.

sentence.en: I unintentionally pushed your girlfriend, but there's no need to fly off the handle.
sentence.uz: Men bilmasdan qiz o'rtog'ingizni turtib yubordim, lekin darrov jahldan chiqib (o'zingizni yo'qotib) baqirishga hojat yo'q.

options: to'satdan qattiq jahli chiqish, o'zini yo'qotish

definition: For a very long time.

sentence.en: I've had this ring for donkey's years.
sentence.uz: Bu uzuk mendan juda uzoq vaqtdan beri bor.

word: For want of a better word
definition: Lacking a more precise word/term; to emphasize that you cannot think of a more accurate way of explaining what you mean.

sentence.en: He is, for want of a better word, a grumbler.
sentence.uz: U, boshqa mosroq so'z topilmagani uchun aytganda, nolib yuradigan odam.

definition: Influential and powerful people who will help you in case of emergency.

sentence.en: I have plenty of friends in high places, so finding a new job is not a problem.
sentence.uz: Mening yuqori doiralarda (katta lavozimlarda) do'stlarim ko'p, shuning uchun yangi ish topish muammo emas.

definition: To make an effort to control your behaviour, manners, or emotions.

sentence.en: Get a grip on yourself and stop crying!
sentence.uz: O'zingni qo'lga ol va yig'lashni to'xtat!

definition: To catch or find someone.

sentence.en: When I get my hands on him, he will have to pay off his debts.
sentence.uz: Uni qo'limga tushirganimda (topganimda), u hamma qarzlarini to'lashiga to'g'ri keladi.

definition: To delay someone by providing useless information or directions.

sentence.en: Sounds like you're giving me the runaround. I need to know exactly when this project will be launched!
sentence.uz: Meni chalg'itayotganga (aniq javob bermay vaqtni cho'zayotganga) o'xshaysiz. Menga loyiha aniq qachon ishga tushishi kerakligi ma'lum bo'lishi lozim!

options: aniq javob bermay chalg'itish, vaqtni cho'zish

word: Go at it hammer and tongs
definition: With great energy, power, passion, or enthusiasm; very intensively; to have a very noisy argument.

sentence.en: Our neighbors were going at it hammer and tongs all night.
sentence.uz: Qo'shnilarimiz tuni bilan baqir-chaqir qilib urishib (g'alva qilib) chiqishdi.

options: katta g'ayrat bilan kirishish / qattiq janjallashish
